question.cover: Cover is {{CoverCharge}}g after {{CoverStartsAtText}}. Pay to enter?
dialogue.paid: The bouncer collects a {{CoverCharge}}g cover charge.
dialogue.no-money: The bouncer blocks the way. Cover is {{CoverCharge}}g.
dialogue.leave: The bouncer sends you back outside.
gmcm.cover-charge.name: Cover Charge
gmcm.cover-charge.tooltip: Gold charged when entering the Saloon after the cover starts.
gmcm.cover-starts-at.name: Cover Starts At
gmcm.cover-starts-at.tooltip: Stardew time when the bouncer starts asking for cover.
gmcm.sunday.name: Sunday Cover
gmcm.sunday.tooltip: Require a cover charge on Sundays.
gmcm.monday.name: Monday Cover
gmcm.monday.tooltip: Require a cover charge on Mondays.
gmcm.tuesday.name: Tuesday Cover
gmcm.tuesday.tooltip: Require a cover charge on Tuesdays.
gmcm.wednesday.name: Wednesday Cover
gmcm.wednesday.tooltip: Require a cover charge on Wednesdays.
gmcm.thursday.name: Thursday Cover
gmcm.thursday.tooltip: Require a cover charge on Thursdays.
gmcm.friday.name: Friday Cover
gmcm.friday.tooltip: Require a cover charge on Fridays.
gmcm.saturday.name: Saturday Cover
gmcm.saturday.tooltip: Require a cover charge on Saturdays.
gmcm.pay-once.name: Pay Once Per Day
gmcm.pay-once.tooltip: When enabled, each player only pays the cover once per in-game day.
gmcm.bouncer-x.name: Bouncer Tile X
gmcm.bouncer-x.tooltip: Horizontal tile where the vanilla bouncer is drawn inside the Saloon.
gmcm.bouncer-y.name: Bouncer Tile Y
gmcm.bouncer-y.tooltip: Vertical tile where the vanilla bouncer is drawn inside the Saloon.
